narrative:
Fremont City 4-C (precinct in Sandusky County) has 355 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.1 percentage points.
